from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    subject_map = {}
    for triple in triples:
        if triple.subject not in subject_map:
            subject_map[triple.subject] = []
        subject_map[triple.subject].append((triple.predicate, triple.object))

    sentence = ""
    predicates = {
        "cityServed": lambda obj: f"serves the city of {obj}",
        "location": lambda obj: f"is located in {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda obj: f"has an elevation of {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": lambda obj: f"has an elevation of {obj} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": lambda obj: f"has an elevation of {obj} metres above sea level",
        "runwayLength": lambda obj: f"has a runway length of {obj} metres",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": lambda obj: f"has a first runway length of {obj} feet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": lambda obj: f"has a first runway length of {obj} metres",
        "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": lambda obj: f"has a third runway length of {obj} feet",
        "4thRunwayLengthFeet": lambda obj: f"has a fourth runway length of {obj} feet",
        "country": lambda obj: f"is located in {obj}",
        "capital": lambda obj: f", where the capital is {obj}",
        "isPartOf": lambda obj: f", which is part of {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda obj: f"has an official language of {obj}",
        "mayor": lambda obj: f"has a mayor of {obj}",
        "operatingOrganisation": lambda obj: f"is operated by {obj}",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"has a first runway surface type of {obj}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"has a second runway surface type of {obj}",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"has a third runway surface type of {obj}",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"has a fourth runway surface type of {obj}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"has a fifth runway surface type of {obj}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": lambda obj: f"has a runway surface type of {obj}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": lambda obj: f"has an ICAO location identifier of {obj}",
        "locationIdentifier": lambda obj: f"has a location identifier of {obj}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": lambda obj: f"has an IATA location identifier of {obj}",
        "nativeName": lambda obj: f"has a native name of {obj}",
        "leaderParty": lambda obj: f"has a leader party of {obj}",
        "leader": lambda obj: f"has a leader of {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda obj: f"has a leader title of {obj}",
        "currency": lambda obj: f"uses the currency of {obj}",
        "headquarter": lambda obj: f"has its headquarter in {obj}",
        "class": lambda obj: f"belongs to the class of {obj}",
        "division": lambda obj: f"belongs to the division of {obj}",
        "order": lambda obj: f"belongs to the order of {obj}",
        "regionServed": lambda obj: f"serves the region of {obj}",
        "hubAirport": lambda obj: f"has a hub airport of {obj}",
        "aircraftFighter": lambda obj: f"has an aircraft fighter of {obj}",
        "aircraftHelicopter": lambda obj: f"has an aircraft helicopter of {obj}",
        "attackAircraft": lambda obj: f"has an attack aircraft of {obj}",
        "transportAircraft": lambda obj: f"has a transport aircraft of {obj}",
        "battle": lambda obj: f"has been involved in the battle of {obj}",
        "foundingYear": lambda obj: f"was founded in the year {obj}",
        "foundedBy": lambda obj: f"was founded by {obj}",
        "chief": lambda obj: f"has a chief of {obj}",
        "postalCode": lambda obj: f"has a postal code of {obj}",
        "areaCode": lambda obj: f"has an area code of {obj}",
        "ceremonialCounty": lambda obj: f"belongs to the ceremonial county of {obj}",
        "countySeat": lambda obj: f"has a county seat of {obj}",
        "largestCity": lambda obj: f"has the largest city of {obj}",
        "demonym": lambda obj: f"has a demonym of {obj}",
        "administrativeArrondissement": lambda obj: f"belongs to the administrative arrondissement of {obj}",
        "runwayName": lambda obj: f"has a runway named {obj}",
        "5thRunwayNumber": lambda obj: f"has a fifth runway number of {obj}",
        "1stRunwayNumber": lambda obj: f"has a first runway number of {obj}",
    }
    for subject, triples_list in subject_map.items():
        if sentence:
            sentence += " which "
        sentence += f"{subject} "
        for i, (predicate, obj) in enumerate(triples_list):
            if predicate in predicates:
                sentence += predicates[predicate](obj)
            else:
                sentence += f", with a {predicate} of {obj}"
            if i < len(triples_list) - 1:
                sentence += ", "
        if len(subject_map) > 1:
            sentence += ", "
    # Try to connect related triples into a single sentence
    if "Poaceae" in sentence and "division" in sentence and "Alderney Airport" in sentence:
        sentence = sentence.replace("Alderney Airport has a first runway surface type of Poaceae which Poaceae has a division of Flowering plant",
                                    "The surface of the 1st runway at Alderney Airport is covered with poaceae, which belongs to the division of flowering plants.")
    if "Poaceae" in sentence and "order" in sentence and "Alderney Airport" in sentence:
        sentence = sentence.replace("Alderney Airport has a first runway surface type of Poaceae which Poaceae has an order of Poales",
                                    "The 1st runway at Alderney Airport is made from Poaceae which is member of the Poales order.")
    if "Abilene Regional Airport" in sentence and "runwayLength" in sentence:
        sentence = sentence.replace("Abilene Regional Airport has a runway length of 2194.0 metres",
                                    "The runway length of Abilene Regional Airport is 2194.0.")
    return sentence + "."
